visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind two soda cans.
A red Coca-Cola soda can, located on the left side and in front of the water bottle.
A green Sprite soda can, located on the right side and in front of the water bottle.
A brown paper bag is visible behind the objects on the table.
The objects are placed on a wooden tabletop surface.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is blocking the front of the water bottle and must be moved to access it.
The green soda can is also blocking the front of the water bottle and must be moved to access it.
Pick the clear water bottle now that the path is clear.
